Name: Oberon Confederation
Description: The Oberon Confederation is quite simply a bandit state, veiled in a thin veneer of legitimacy. Piracy and slavery are still rampant, although House Grimm has taken steps to push such things out of the public eye.
ReputationStatements: I'd rather be hiring Oberon boys for this job. Unfortunately they're busy elsewhere.
House Grimm says we're a proper nation now. Maybe so. Doesn't mean I like trusting mercenaries.
Some people stopped paying tribute. That's a mistake we intend to correct.
Welcome to the Oberon Confederation. Our authority in this region is not optional. Now the pleasantries are done, I've got work for mercs of your caliber.
Order isn't free. Neither is protection. Time somebody remembered that.
My old raider crew would've liked you. Professional, dangerous, and not too chatty.
House Grimm has taken notice of your company. That's usually a good thing. Means I can give you the real important jobs now.
MissionSuccessStatements: That's settled, then. Funny how reasonable people become after a demonstration of force.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: The target got away with something today. Doesn't mean they'll get away forever.
BadFaithFailureStatements: You ran. That's the sort of thing people remember. Now every little world on the border is going to wonder if they can tell us no.
